creator: mvharding@gmail.com
text: The patch apply in bug #205281 causes avahi-daemon to not start for me (and presumably others).  I put attachments on that bug showing output of /var/log/all.log and rcorder output with and without the 'BEFORE' line patched in that bug.  I build my own packages with Poudriere so I saw this right away.  I am running Gnome 3 if that makes any difference.
